name: PET/CT Whole Body
description: FDG PET/CT whole body imaging for oncologic evaluation and staging

findings.technique: FDG PET/CT was performed from the skull base to the mid-thighs following approximately [X] mCi of FDG administration. Low-dose CT was used for attenuation correction and localization.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Brain
sections.content: The brain demonstrates [no abnormal FDG uptake / physiologic distribution]. No hypermetabolic foci to suggest metastatic disease.

sections.name: Head and Neck
sections.content: The head and neck demonstrate [no abnormal FDG uptake / physiologic distribution]. No hypermetabolic lymph nodes or masses.

sections.name: Chest
sections.content: The lungs demonstrate [no hypermetabolic nodules / no abnormal FDG uptake]. The mediastinal lymph nodes demonstrate [no abnormal FDG uptake / physiologic activity].

sections.name: Abdomen and Pelvis
sections.content: The liver demonstrates [no abnormal FDG uptake / physiologic distribution]. The spleen is [unremarkable]. No hypermetabolic masses in the abdomen or pelvis.

sections.name: Musculoskeletal
sections.content: The bones demonstrate [no abnormal FDG uptake / no hypermetabolic lesions to suggest metastatic disease].

sections.name: Lymph Nodes
sections.content: There is [no pathologically enlarged lymph nodes / no hypermetabolic lymphadenopathy] identified.

sections.name: Bone Marrow
sections.content: The bone marrow demonstrates [physiologic FDG uptake / no abnormal hypermetabolic activity].

impression:
1. Normal FDG PET/CT whole body study.
2. No evidence of hypermetabolic malignancy or metastatic disease.
